mapper.insert: insert into kh_user_symptom (name, status, user_id, symptom_id, cause_resource_type, cause_resource_id, start_date, end_date, description) values ( #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{symptomId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{causeResourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{causeResourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update kh_user_symptom set
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
symptom_id = null,
symptom_id = #{symptomId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
cause_resource_type = null,
cause_resource_type = #{causeResourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
cause_resource_id = null,
cause_resource_id = #{causeResourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = now() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, name, status, user_id, symptom_id, cause_resource_type, cause_resource_id, start_date, end_date, description, create_time, update_time from kh_user_symptom where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id, name, status, user_id, symptom_id, cause_resource_type, cause_resource_id, start_date, end_date, create_time, update_time from kh_user_symptom where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and (status = 1 or status = 2)
